title: cleyera lushia var. wallichiana
intro: Cleyera lushia var. wallichiana, also known as the Ceylon wax tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Theaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. Cleyera lushia var. wallichiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in the form of extracts and ointments for topical application.
